name: edit_file
description: Edit a file by exact string replacement. The string `old` must appear exactly once in the file; it is replaced with `new`. To create a new file, use an empty `old` on a non-existing path.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root.

old.description: Exact text to replace; must match exactly once. Empty to create a new file.

new.description: Replacement text (the full file content when creating).
